tasks.prompt: Open the Study Tool and do the Vocabulary round until you score at least 7/10.
Read 'A Fair World' (MORE! 4, p. 112) and underline 5 new words.
Write the 5 new words with their German meaning.
Record yourself reading the first paragraph aloud and send it on WhatsApp.
Take these 3 basic sentences and rewrite them in upgraded B1 English: (1) It's a bad thing that some people are poor. (2) We should help poor countries. (3) Small things you do can change a lot.
Write 3 sentences about something you think is unfair in the world.
Record yourself reading your 3 upgraded sentences aloud.
Open the Study Tool and complete the Conditionals practice section.
First conditional: complete 'If we buy Fair Trade, ...' three different ways.
Second conditional: 'If I had a million euros, I would ...' three different ways.
Record 3 second-conditional sentences about making the world fairer.
Open the Study Tool and do the German trap drill until you get all of them right.
Write 4 sentences using words or structures you used to get wrong (false friends / if-clauses).
Record a 1-minute talk: 'One thing I would change to make the world fairer.'
